goals: Expose a single `sample()` function that wraps ComfyUI's KSampler with a clean, typed Python API.
Delegate 100 % of denoising logic to `comfy.*` internals — no custom sampler implementations.
Keep `from pycomfy.sampling import sample` CPU-safe (no torch import at module level).
Allow sampler name, scheduler, CFG scale, step count, and seed to be fully controlled by the caller.

userStories.title: `sample()` returns a denoised latent
userStories.description: As a Python developer building an inference pipeline, I want to call `sample(model, positive, negative, latent, steps, cfg, sampler_name, scheduler, seed)` so that I receive a denoised latent tensor I can immediately pass to VAE decode.

acceptanceCriteria.text: The function signature is: `sample(model, positive, negative, latent, steps, cfg, sampler_name, scheduler, seed, *, denoise: float = 1.0) -> Any`.
The return value is the raw denoised latent object produced by `comfy` — no additional wrapping or transformation.
The function calls `comfy`'s sampler using the same call pattern as the `KSampler` / `common_ksampler` node in `vendor/ComfyUI/nodes.py` (verified by grepping before implementation).
Typecheck / lint passes (`ruff check . && mypy pycomfy/`).

userStories.title: Sampler and scheduler are selectable by name
userStories.description: As a Python developer, I want to pass `sampler_name="euler"` and `scheduler="normal"` as plain strings so that I can switch between any ComfyUI-supported sampler/scheduler combination without modifying pycomfy.

acceptanceCriteria.text: `sampler_name` and `scheduler` are plain `str` parameters with no default that silently overrides the caller's choice (defaults are permitted only if they are documented and clearly labelled as such in the docstring).
The strings are passed through to `comfy` unchanged — pycomfy does not validate, transform, or reject any sampler or scheduler name.
A unit test using mocks verifies that `comfy`'s internal call receives exactly the `sampler_name` and `scheduler` values the caller passed.

userStories.title: Seed is controllable for reproducibility
userStories.description: As a Python developer building production pipelines, I want to pass `seed=42` so that I get a deterministic result for the same model, conditioning, and latent inputs.

acceptanceCriteria.text: The value is passed through to `comfy`'s sampler call unchanged — reproducibility is comfy's responsibility.
A unit test using mocks verifies that the seed value reaches the underlying comfy call.

userStories.title: CPU-only import never crashes
userStories.description: As a CI pipeline (CPU-only), I want `from pycomfy.sampling import sample` to succeed without a GPU, torch, or any model files so that the test suite stays green in all environments.

acceptanceCriteria.text: `uv run python -c "from pycomfy.sampling import sample; print('ok')"` exits with code 0 on a CPU-only machine.
No `import torch`, no `import comfy.*`, and no ComfyUI path manipulation happens at module import time — these are deferred to call time only.
The CI smoke test for this import is added to the pytest suite and passes.

functionalRequirements.description: ** `pycomfy/sampling.py` must exist and define `sample` as its sole public export (listed in `__all__`). The full signature is `sample(model, positive, negative, latent, steps, cfg, sampler_name, scheduler, seed, *, denoise: float = 1.0) -> Any`; `denoise` defaults to `1.0` (full denoising) and is passed through to comfy unchanged.

** `sample()` must delegate denoising to `comfy` internals using the call pattern extracted from the `KSampler` / `common_ksampler` node in `vendor/ComfyUI/nodes.py`. The call pattern must be verified by inspection before implementation.
** No `torch` import, no `comfy.*` import, and no `ensure_comfyui_on_path()` call may appear at module top level — only inside function bodies.
** `sampler_name` and `scheduler` string values are passed through to comfy as-is; pycomfy does not validate or reject unknown values.
** `seed` is passed through to comfy as-is; pycomfy does not manage RNG state beyond forwarding the value.
** All public functions must carry type annotations; the module must pass `mypy pycomfy/` without new errors.
** `ruff check .` must pass with no new violations.
** The `pycomfy/__init__.py` public surface is updated to expose `sample` (re-export or documented import path, consistent with how `models` and `conditioning` were handled).
